filter_reason: A document-analysis system for papers and reports - a practical LLM application/engineering paper, incremental and not capability- or orchestration-moving.
title: DocMaster: A Hierarchical Structure-Aware System for Document Analysis
excerpt: Leveraging large language models (LLMs) to analyze complex documents -- such as academic papers, technical manuals, and financial reports -- has emerged as a mainstream and critical task in both research and industry. In practice, users must first filter relevant documents from large collections and then conduct in-depth analysis (e.g. question answering) over the selected subset, yet existing systems flatten documents into plain-text chunks, discarding the rich hierarchical structures (sections, tables, figures, equations) and degrading downstream performance.
